description:
Azure ServiceActivation ImportData ‚Äî registers an Azure resource
provider on the customer's subscription.

Added by the `AzureServiceActivationMutation` preflight when the
stack contains resources that depend on a specific Azure RP
(Microsoft.App, Microsoft.Storage, Microsoft.KeyVault, ‚Ä¶).

registered.description: True once the provider is reported `Registered`.

subscriptionId.description: Subscription ID the provider was registered on.
